name: Cumulative Flow (30 Days)
description: Cumulative flow by status category for last 30 days
query:
SELECT
    v_facts.full_date AS date,
    COALESCE(v_facts.slice_value, 'all') AS status_category,
    SUM(v_facts.value) AS total_issues
FROM metrics.v_facts
WHERE v_facts.calc_code = 'cfd_count'
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{date_range}}]]
GROUP BY v_facts.full_date, COALESCE(v_facts.slice_value, 'all')
ORDER BY v_facts.full_date
